summary_text: **Findings (high → low)** - **High: preflight/apply path still blocks short `note.com` leads, even though runtime approval/scheduler already exempt them.** In [`prepare_post_bundle.py` line 56](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/scripts\/prepare_post_bundle.py#L56), `_coerce_post()` unconditionally adds a blocking note for `len(text) < min_chars`. In [`prepare_post_bundle.py` line 162](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/scripts\/prepare_post_bundle.py#L162), `_scheduler_gate_notes()` also adds the same blocker before returning early for note posts at line 166. Result: short note leads are marked not-ready in preflight, and `apply_post_package --approve` returns `preflight_blocked`. - **High: this mismatch is already captured by failing tests.** Failing now: - [`test_prepare_post_bundle.py::test_prepare_post_allows_short_note_when_scheduler_ready`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/tests\/test_prepare_post_bundle.py#L232) - [`test_apply_post_package.py::test_main_allows_approved_short_note_input`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/tests\/test_apply_post_package.py#L192) - **Medium: non-note behavior is already well-covered and should remain unchanged.** Existing guards for non-note short text still pass and should be preserved: - [`test_approval_guard.py::test_post_created_after_cutoff_requires_minimum_text_length`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/tests\/test_approval_guard.py#L158) - [`test_scheduler_r11_r12.py::test_queue_audit_flags_approved_short_text_gate`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/tests\/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L469) **Concrete minimal patch plan** 1. **Change only one runtime file:** [`scripts/prepare_post_bundle.py`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/scripts\/prepare_post_bundle.py) - In `_coerce_post()`, skip the `min_chars` blocking note when text contains `note.com/`. - In `_scheduler_gate_notes()`, compute `is_note_article` first and skip the `min_chars` blocking note for note posts (keep all current non-note checks unchanged). 2. **No changes to core runtime gates** (`approval_guard.py`, `scheduler.py`, `queue_audit.py`) because they already implement the desired note exemption while preserving non-note gating. 3. **Test execution (no/low test edits needed):** - Re-run the two currently failing tests above and confirm green. - Re-run non-note guard regressions: - [`tests/test_approval_guard.py`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/tests\/test_approval_guard.py) - [`tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py::test_queue_audit_flags_approved_short_text_gate`](\/Users\/masayuki\/Dev\/x-auto\/tests\/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L469) - Optional full confidence set: `tests/test_prepare_post_bundle.py tests/test_apply_post_package.py tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py tests/test_approval_guard.py` This is the smallest safe fix that unlocks short `note.com` lead approvals/scheduling without weakening non-note posts.
